title: Senior Software Engineer - Oracle India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Oracle India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Oracle India has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!
